title: 3) Pulse diagnosis
text:
Pulse  and  tongue  diagnosis  are  mandatory  procedure  in  cosmetic  acupuncture.
Remember the ﬁrst principle. We are approaching the patient's skin with energy regulation
on  the  whole  body.  Without  proper  TCM  diagnosis,  you  cannot  regulate  the  channels
properly. Also, a change of pulse through the procedure can give you valuable information
regarding prognosis and the usage of herbs.
